monitoring.watch_loss_and_epsilon: Monitor: each checkpoint row should report loss_is_finite=true and the episode-indexed epsilon (1.0 at ep0 -> 0.0 at ep2500 -> 0.0 after).
monitoring.watch_action_distribution: Per-checkpoint candidate eval action_distribution should begin to spread from pure-local toward a mix as epsilon decays past ~ep2500.
monitoring.watch_reconciliation: Every candidate/baseline row must keep reward_reconciled=true, terminal_reconciled=true, raw_vs_canonical_delta=0, coverage=1.0.
suggested_commands: python -m src.analysis.paper_faithful_simulation_production.runner --json  # schema check on latest metrics

abort_conditions.action: abort; inspect td-target-loss; do not continue

abort_conditions.condition: reward_reconciled or terminal_reconciled becomes false at any checkpoint
abort_conditions.action: abort; reconciliation regression must be root-caused before resuming
abort; free storage, resume from last good ckpt
